title: Colgate Baking Soda and Peroxide Whitening Toothpaste - 6 ounce (2 Count)
features: Whitening toothpaste features a unique baking soda and peroxide formula that releases pure oxygen bubbles for a clean, fresh sensation
This baking soda toothpaste helps remove teeth stains for whiter teeth
Colgate baking soda and peroxide toothpaste cleans deep and whitens teeth
Add this baking soda whitening toothpaste to your oral care routine to help fight cavities
Colgate Baking Soda and Peroxide Whitening Toothpaste removes plaque and impurities with regular brushing
description: Product Description Colgate Baking Soda and Peroxide Whitening Toothpaste - 6 ounce (2 Count) Ingredients Active Ingredient: Sodium Monofluorophosphate (0.76% (0.14% w/v Fluoride Ion)). Purpose: Anticavity. Inactive Ingredients: Glycerin, Hydrated Silica, Water, Sodium Bicarbonate, PEG-12, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Flavor, Sodium Hydroxide, Cellulose Gum, Carrageenan, Sodium Saccharin, Calcium Peroxide, Titanium Dioxide. Directions Apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste to your toothbrush. Brush your teeth in circular motions, focusing on all surfaces, including the gum line and tongue. Brush for at least 2 minutes, then rinse thoroughly with water. Use twice daily for effective teeth cleaning and whitening. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs. See more
